summary:
Treatment with Bacillus Calmette-Guérin (BCG) is a standard first-line therapy for high-grade non-muscle-invasive bladder cancers, including carcinoma in situ and high-grade T1 tumors. It works by stimulating immune responses and directly affecting tumor cell growth to prevent disease recurrence. 

Note that this summary only includes information from Agent1's response; it does not include any external knowledge or additional context beyond what was provided.
